title: Extract string utilities into shared module
description: Moves duplicated string helper functions from three different modules into a single shared utils.strings module.
diff:
diff --git a/utils/strings.py b/utils/strings.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b3c4d5e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/utils/strings.py
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+
+def slugify(text: str) -> str:
+    return text.lower().strip().replace(' ', '-')
+
+
+def truncate(text: str, max_length: int = 100) -> str:
+    if len(text) <= max_length:
+        return text
+    return text[:max_length - 3] + '...'
+
+
+def camel_to_snake(name: str) -> str:
+    import re
+    s1 = re.sub('(.)([A-Z][a-z]+)', r'\1_\2', name)
+    return re.sub('([a-z0-9])([A-Z])', r'\1_\2', s1).lower()
comments: leo: LGTM, all callers updated correctly.
author: mike
